targets.rawSql:
SELECT	T1.ServiceName
		,T1.Schedule
		,T1.Client
		,T1.Policy
		,T1.Started
		,T1.Ended
		,CASE WHEN T1.Ended IS NOT NULL THEN T1.ElapsedTime
		      WHEN T1.Ended IS NULL THEN NULL
			  ELSE NULL
		 END AS Elapsed
		,FORMAT(100 - (T1.Elapsed / T1.ElpasedStd * 100), '##0.#') + '%' AS ElapsedPerStd		
		,CASE WHEN T1.Status = 0 THEN '정상'
			  WHEN T1.STATUS IS NULL AND T1.Ended IS NULL THEN '진행중'
			  ELSE '오류'
		 END AS Status
FROM	(
		SELECT CASE WHEN policy = 'lpscsdb01_mssql' THEN '[POS]매출'
					WHEN policy = 'lpgms-sqldb_mssql_lpgms' THEN '[마케팅]사은'
					WHEN policy = 'lpbakdb01_rman_start' THEN '[MD]영업통합'
					WHEN policy = 'lpgcsdb_mssql' THEN '[상품권]상품권'
					WHEN policy = 'culture-sql_mssql' THEN '[마케팅]문화센터'
					WHEN policy = 'ld-hrdb01_rman' THEN '[경영지원]인사'
					WHEN policy = 'dvdb2_rman_start' THEN '[마케팅]배송'
					WHEN policy = 'lpgms-sqldb_mssql_stg' THEN '[마케팅]사은STG'
					WHEN policy = 'lpenr-sqldb_mssql' THEN '[마케팅]에누리'
					WHEN policy = 'ldps_mssql' THEN '[경영지원]동료사원'
					WHEN policy = 'ld-imdb1_mssql' THEN '[경영지원]계정관리'
					WHEN policy = 'lpea-sqldb_mssql' THEN '[경영지원]전자결재'
					ELSE policy
			   END ServiceName 
			 , Schedule
			 , Client
			 , Policy
			 , format(Started,'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') Started
			 , format(Ended,'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') Ended
			 , STATE as State
			 , CASE WHEN policy = 'lpscsdb01_mssql' THEN 10800			--[POS]매출			3시간
					WHEN policy = 'lpgms-sqldb_mssql_lpgms' THEN 7200	--[마케팅]사은		3시간
					WHEN policy = 'lpbakdb01_rman_start' THEN 43200		--[MD]영업통합		12시간
					WHEN policy = 'lpgcsdb_mssql' THEN 10800			--[상품권]상품권	2시간
					WHEN policy = 'culture-sql_mssql' THEN 1800			--[마케팅]문화센터	30분
					WHEN policy = 'ld-hrdb01_rman' THEN 3600			--[경지]인사		1시간
					WHEN policy = 'dvdb2_rman_start' THEN 2400			--[마케팅]배송		40분
					WHEN policy = 'lpgms-sqldb_mssql_stg' THEN 1500		--[마케팅]사은STG	25분
					WHEN policy = 'lpenr-sqldb_mssql' THEN 1500			--[마케팅]에누리	25분
					WHEN policy = 'ldps_mssql' THEN 720					--[경지]동료사원	12분
					WHEN policy = 'ld-imdb1_mssql' THEN 2400			--[경지]계정관리	40분
					WHEN policy = 'lpea-sqldb_mssql' THEN 3900			--[경지]전자결재	1시간5분
					ELSE policy
			   END ElpasedStd
			 , CASE WHEN Ended IS NOT NULL THEN Elapsed ELSE NULL END AS Elapsed
			 , format(ENDED - STARTED,'HH:mm:ss') AS ElapsedTime
			 , Status
		  FROM TB_Bak_Stat_Chk_L
		 WHERE 1=1
		   AND collectDT = convert(varchar(8),getdate(),112)
		   AND policy in ('lpscsdb01_mssql',
						  'lpgms-sqldb_mssql_lpgms',
						  'lpbakdb01_rman_start',
						  'lpgcsdb_mssql',
						  'culture-sql_mssql',
						  'ld-hrdb01_rman',
						  'dvdb2_rman_start',
						  'lpgms-sqldb_mssql_stg',
						  'lpenr-sqldb_mssql',
						  'ldps_mssql',
						  'ld-imdb1_mssql',
						  'lpea-sqldb_mssql')
		   AND Schedule = 'full_daily'
		) T1

SELECT VPC, CASE WHEN VPC = 'DEV' THEN 0
                 WHEN VPC = 'SOL' THEN 1
                 WHEN VPC = 'PRD' THEN 2
             END AS GBN
     , r.ServerHost, ServerName
     , VPC_Zone as ZONE--, SUBSTRING(VPC_Zone,LEN(VPC_Zone),1) as ZONE
     , ServerClass, ISNULL(e.ERR_CNT,0) as ERR_CNT
     /*, DBMS_Version, Log_List, Status */
     , Memory_GB as MEM_GB, Storage_Size_GB as Storage_GB, Storage_Type, iops
     , CPUUtilization as CPU_PCT
     , ROUND((1-(FreeableMemory/(Memory_GB*1024*1024*1024)))*100,2) as MEM_PCT
     , ROUND((1-(FreeStorageSpace/(CAST(Storage_Size_GB as BIGINT)*1024*1024*1024)))*100, 2) as Storage_PCT
     , TotalIOPS
     , CollectDT, CollectHH, CollectDTM
  FROM (
        SELECT a.VPC, a.ServerHost, a.ServerName, a.VPC_Zone, a.ServerClass/*, a.DBMS_Version, a.Log_List, a.Status*/
             , a.Storage_Size_GB, b.Memory_GB, a.Storage_Type, a.iops, c.CPUUtilization, c.FreeableMemory, c.FreeStorageSpace, c.ReadIOPS, c.WriteIOPS, c.ReadIOPS + c.WriteIOPS as TotalIOPS
             , c.CollectDT, c.CollectHH, c.CollectDTM
             , RANK() OVER( PARTITION BY a.ServerHost ORDER BY c.CollectDT DESC, c.CollectHH DESC, c.CollectDTM DESC) RNK
        FROM [dbo].[TB_Rds_Comm_Info_M] A
	        inner join [dbo].[TB_Rds_Class_Info_M] B
            on A.ServerClass = B.ServerClass
	        left join (SELECT ServerHost
			         , CollectDT
			         , CollectHH
			         , MAX(CollectDTM) AS CollectDTM
                     , MAX([CPUUtilization]) AS [CPUUtilization]
			         , MIN([FreeableMemory]) AS [FreeableMemory]
			         , MIN([FreeStorageSpace]) AS [FreeStorageSpace]
			         , MAX([ReadIOPS]) AS [ReadIOPS]
			         , MAX([WriteIOPS]) AS [WriteIOPS]
		        FROM (SELECT ServerHost
				           , CollectDT
				           , CollectHH
				           , CollectDTM
				           , Rsrc_Name
				           , Rsrc_Val
			           FROM [dbo].[TB_Rds_Rsrc_L] Z
			          WHERE Z.CollectDT = CONVERT(VARCHAR, GETDATE(), 112)
			        ) AS x
		        Pivot(Max(Rsrc_Val) FOR Rsrc_Name IN ([CPUUtilization], [FreeableMemory], [FreeStorageSpace], [ReadIOPS], [WriteIOPS])) AS pv
		        GROUP BY ServerHost, CollectDT, CollectHH
		        ) AS C on A.ServerHost = C.ServerHost
       ) AS R
       left join (SELECT d.ServerHost, COUNT(d.CollectDT) ERR_CNT
                    FROM [dbo].[TB_RDS_ERR_CHK_L] D
                   WHERE D.CollectDT BETWEEN CONVERT(VARCHAR, GETDATE()-1, 112) AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, GETDATE(), 112) 
                  GROUP BY d.ServerHost) E on r.ServerHost = e.ServerHost
 WHERE RNK = 1	
 ORDER BY VPC DESC, r.ServerHost

SELECT CollectDTM, 
       SUBSTRING(ResourceIdentifier,CHARINDEX(':db:',(ResourceIdentifier))+LEN(':db:'),LEN(ResourceIdentifier)) as Target, 
       Summary, Detail, AutoAppliedAfterDate as AutoApp, ForcedApplyDate as ForceApp, CurrentApplyDate as CurApp
FROM dbo.TB_Rds_Maintenance_L
where CollectDTM >= GETDATE()-1
order by CollectDTM desc

SELECT Inst_Name, Identifier_Name, Table_name
     , IncomingChanges, ChangesDiskTarget
     , ThroughputRowsSource, ThroughputRowsTarget
     , LatencySource, LatencyTarget
     , CollectDT, CollectHH, CollectDTM
  FROM (
        SELECT a.Inst_Name, a.Identifier_Name, a.Table_name
             , c.CollectDT, c.CollectHH, c.CollectDTM
             , c.IncomingChanges, c.ChangesDiskTarget
             , c.ThroughputRowsSource, c.ThroughputRowsTarget
             , c.LatencySource, c.LatencyTarget
             , RANK() OVER( PARTITION BY a.Inst_Name, a.Task_Name ORDER BY c.CollectDT DESC, c.CollectHH DESC, c.CollectDTM DESC) RNK
          FROM [dbo].[TB_Dms_Comm_Info_M] A
            INNER join (
                       SELECT Inst_Name, Task_Name
                            , CollectDT
                            , CollectHH
                            , MAX(CollectDTM)                AS CollectDTM
                            , MAX([CDCIncomingChanges])      AS [IncomingChanges]
                            , MAX([CDCChangesDiskTarget])    AS [ChangesDiskTarget]
                            , MAX([CDCThroughputRowsSource]) AS [ThroughputRowsSource]
                            , MAX([CDCThroughputRowsTarget]) AS [ThroughputRowsTarget]
                            , MAX([CDCLatencySource])        AS [LatencySource]
                            , MAX([CDCLatencyTarget])        AS [LatencyTarget]
                    FROM (SELECT Inst_Name
                               , Task_Name
                               , CollectDT
                               , CollectHH
                               , CollectDTM
                               , Rsrc_Name
                               , Rsrc_Val 
                           FROM (SELECT Inst_Name
                                      , Task_Name
                                      , CollectDT
                                      , CollectHH
                                      , CollectDTM
                                      , Rsrc_Name
                                      , Rsrc_Val
                                      , RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY Inst_Name, Task_Name order by CollectDTM desc)  RNK
                                  FROM [dbo].[TB_Dms_Rsrc_L] Z
                                 WHERE Z.CollectDT = CONVERT(VARCHAR, GETDATE(), 112)
                                  -- AND Z.CollectHH = 
                                  ) Z
                           WHERE RNK = 1
                        ) AS x
                    Pivot(MAX(Rsrc_Val) FOR Rsrc_Name IN ([CDCIncomingChanges], [CDCChangesDiskTarget], [CDCThroughputRowsSource], [CDCThroughputRowsTarget], [CDCLatencySource], [CDCLatencyTarget])) AS pv
                    GROUP BY Inst_Name, Task_Name, CollectDT, CollectHH
                ) AS C
         on A.Inst_Name = C.Inst_Name
        and A.Task_Name = C.Task_Name
  ) AS E
 WHERE RNK = 1	
 ORDER BY table_name
